extraction.one_line_summary: BUHURT Tom won intermediate sprint ahead of FINNY Taylor by exploiting slipstream advantage on wet roads where handling risks deterred full sprinting.
tactical_patterns: BUHURT exploited slipstream from leadout rider on flat wet surface while FINNY opened early and lost traction.
BALLERINI rode defensively to protect breakaway rhythm rather than contest sprint despite omnium pedigree showing team priority.

rider_signals.FINNY Taylor: negative: rear wheel skipped on white line during sprint effort revealing bike handling vulnerability in wet conditions
rider_signals.BALLERINI Davide: neutral: former omnium champion declined to contest intermediate sprint to maintain break tempo for Astana tactics
